heading: SURF & SKATE IN MOROCCO
description: Centrally located in Tamraght we welcome you in our beautiful house with a rooftop terrace overlooking Taghazout Bay. What to expect? Many skate and surf sessions, freshly cooked tajines, rooftop parties, sunset BBQ's, movie nights and many many unforgettable memories. Yallah!

backgroundImage.alt: Coastal sunset view of Tamraght, Morocco
